hero.title: Capture every thought.
hero.subtitle: Deepink is a <0>privacy-first</0> note-taking app to capture ideas fast, without the clutter.

encryption.title: A vault you can trust
encryption.text:
Everything in your vault is encrypted — and we mean <0>all your data</0>: notes, files, and metadata. Pick the algorithm you trust.

Deepink is <1>open source</1>, with code you can verify, not just trust.

workflow.title: Fast, focused workflow
workflow.text: We measure clicks and keystrokes, then cut what doesn’t earn its place. For most tasks, Deepink needs <0>up to 80% fewer actions</0> than other note-taking apps.

universality.title: One vault, many worlds
universality.text: Create one password-protected vault, bring your notes in, and keep everything together. Workspaces and nested tags help you separate and find anything instantly — from project specs, contracts, and code snippets to book quotes, a daily journal, research, and more.

intro.title: Structure your thinking
intro.text: Capture a quick insight or build something complex. Deepink brings order and focus to everything you write down.

links.title: Links
links.text:
Copy a link to any note and reference it anywhere in your vault. Connect meeting notes to decisions, research to conclusions, and plans to execution without duplicating the same paragraph.

Everything stays in sync. Edit a note once, and every reference stays up to date.

Deepink shows every place a note is mentioned, so you can follow connections and navigate your knowledge naturally.

Keep related information connected. With links, your vault stays consistent.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.text:
Keep different areas of your life separate without creating multiple vaults.

Workspaces create focused spaces inside one secure vault. Unlock your vault once, then switch between contexts like Client Projects, Personal Journal, Health Notes, or Learning without mixing anything.

Stay organized and context-specific. Share your screen with confidence: private workspaces won’t appear by mistake.

One vault. Clear boundaries. Zero friction.

history.title: History
history.text:
Every note has its own version history.

Deepink saves previous versions automatically, so you can see what changed, restore an earlier draft, or follow how an idea developed over time. Whether it was edited yesterday or a year ago, nothing important is lost.

Previous versions are always available when you need them.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.text:
Attach a reminder to any note and get notified at the right time.

Set follow-up reminders for meeting notes, deadlines for project plans, renewal dates for documents, or check-ins for personal goals. Each reminder stays with the exact note, not as a separate task in another app.

When it’s time, you open the note with every detail in place.

Reminders help you act on your information, not just store it.

tags.title: Nested tags
tags.text:
Organize your notes with tags that reflect a clear hierarchy.

Nested tags let you create a parent/child structure, so broad topics can contain specific subtopics. For example, Clients can include individual client names, and Finance can include Taxes, Invoices, and Reports.

Unlike folders, tags aren’t exclusive. A note can have multiple tags at once—client, finance, and a time period—without duplication.

Nested tags give you both precision and flexibility, even when topics overlap.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.text:
Your entire vault is encrypted, not just the parts an app treats as sensitive.

Deepink encrypts everything: notes, attached files, workspaces, and metadata. Some apps only encrypt data during sync or the note text. Deepink protects the full structure of your vault.

Attachments are never left exposed. Metadata isn’t readable. Even file sizes are obfuscated to reduce the risk of analysis.

What you store stays private by design.

cta.title: A space for every part of your life
cta.text: Keep everyday notes, reading, and plans in one private place. Switch contexts in a click, stay organized, and keep writing without breaking your flow.
